name: Sapphire Warner
description:
As the first flower of the spring blossoms. People start to rebuild their lives and shake off the harsh winter. She is a warm and curious soul who is among the lucky few who managed to live through the post war recession and a build a somewhat comfortable life for herself. She has everything that she could hope for but yet she feels something is missing still. She prefers to hang out at the national garden in the weekends ruminating about the direction of her life and relaxing from a week of grueling work. She is clumsy and shy that frustrates her as she desperately wants to form connections and live for something larger than a dead end job.


Her at the office reporting to her boss anxiously waiting for feed back
creator: ShahShakuras
